# Reel Action Digital

> Organic social media management and short-form video content production for businesses across New Zealand. Based in Tauranga, Bay of Plenty.

Reel Action Digital (rad) is a social media content specialist focused on organic content: content that earns views and engagement without paid advertising or boosting. We manage Instagram and Facebook for businesses and professionals, producing short-form video, reels, and photography that build real audiences and generate enquiries.

## Services

- **Social media management**: End-to-end retainer management of Instagram and Facebook — strategy, content production, editing, captions, scheduling, and monthly reporting
- **Short-form video production**: Reels and short-form video produced and edited for organic social performance
- **Photography**: Commercial photography for use across social media and digital marketing
- **Custom packages**: Tailored content packages for businesses with specific requirements

## Who we work with

Businesses and professionals across New Zealand looking to build an organic social media presence. Current and past clients span finance, electrical trades, construction, property, and professional services.

## Our approach

Every account gets a content formula built around what earns reach for that specific business and audience. We lead with organic content because it proves what works before any paid spend is introduced. Once a formula earns reach on its own, paid amplification becomes a lower-risk next step.

## Location

Tauranga, Bay of Plenty, New Zealand. Serving clients nationwide.
